title: Rangefinder HUD
description: Shows you how far away stuff is, useful for finding the dimensions of things.
body:
Adds a distance readout measuring the distance from your head to the center of the block you are looking at. Useful for finding the dimensions of things.

Edit the positions, significant figures, and colors in the config json or with ClothConfig and ModMenu.

A demonstration:
NOTE: THIS MOD DOES NOT INCLUDE ZOOMING, that's a different mod I'm using for demonstration purposes.
